Package org.eventb.internal.core.preferences

Class StorablePreferenceMap<T>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.preferences.CachedPreferenceMap<T>
org.eventb.internal.core.preferences.StorablePreferenceMap<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
TacticsProfilesCache
public abstract class StorablePreferenceMap<T> extends CachedPreferenceMap<T>
This class stores the contents of a map as a string.
